// Generated by github.com/romshark/datapages. DO NOT EDIT.

// Package action provides generators for datastar action hypertext references.
// These references must be used in the templates.
package action

// POSTPageSettingsAlpha references /settings/alpha/
func POSTPageSettingsAlpha() string {
	return "@post('/settings/alpha/')"
}

// POSTPageSettingsZebra references /settings/zebra/
func POSTPageSettingsZebra() string {
	return "@post('/settings/zebra/')"
}
